title: The Great Cake Caper
premise_summary: Villain bakes invisible cake, wears it instead
cover_description: Boomy stands frozen, covered head-to-toe in clear cake, with a slice of cake sliding down his face like a visor.
host_intro: Tonight, Boomy bakes a sneaky cake. It is not sneaky.
host_outro: Boomy’s cake is now a hat. He says it’s haute cuisine.
script:
[TITLE: The Great Cake Caper]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Boomy bakes a sneaky cake. It is not sneaky.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Boomy’s cake is now a hat. He says it’s haute cuisine.]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: villain_fails]

[SETUP]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: confident, triumphant] Behold! The villainous Boomy has crafted the most devious dessert ever—an invisible cake! [STING: villain_entrance]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: smug] It looks like air, tastes like treachery, and will vanish the second anyone tries to eat it!
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: bluster] Now, to place it on the royal banquet table... carefully... oh-so-carefully...
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: tentative] Wait. Why is my paw tingling? [STING: tiny]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Oh no. The cake is... sticking to me.
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: scrambling] It’s not invisible—it’s just *clear*! And now it’s climbing up my arm like syrup!
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: panicked, loud] I’m turning into a cake statue! [STING: medium_hit]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: desperate] The frosting is hardening! My villain cape is now a fondant bow!
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: outraged] This was supposed to be a *stealth* dessert, not a *self*-dessert!
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: stunned, quiet] ...I can’t move my whiskers. [STING: deflation]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: devastated] The royal guards are pointing. And laughing. And taking *pictures*.
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: defensive] This is *artisanal* villainy! It’s a *cake installation*!
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]I’M WEARING THE CAKE LIKE A HELMET AND IT’S DRIPPING INTO MY EARS![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: big_crash]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: Boomy stands frozen, covered head-to-toe in clear cake, with a slice of cake sliding down his face like a visor.]
[PREMISE: Villain bakes invisible cake, wears it instead]
